title: Multi‑brand Gift Card

title: Savory Lamb Tagine
description: How can I prepare a traditional, savory lamb tagine?

The narrative should explain that the user is looking for step‑by‑step preparation instructions, cooking times, and ingredient proportions for a straightforward, non‑sweet lamb tagine. Documents focusing on sweet variations, other meats, or unrelated cuisines are not relevant.
